note: Regression tests for English word katakana readings in nvdajp-eng-dic. These are final-output-style expectations (katakana) after MeCab analysis. They do NOT guarantee NVDA/JTalk final speech output, because libkuraji and NVDA apply further post-processing (mecab_correct.py, symbol handling, capitalization, etc.). They only guarantee that the dictionary itself returns the listed reading for the surface form.
Long-vowel rule regression: arpabet_to_kana.py must collapse consecutive chouon marks instead of producing フェーー.
Velar nasal + K and schwa + L regressions.
Consecutive N+AH+N regression: schwa-sonorant rule must not produce ンン.
